tagline: Southeastern Massachusetts' Vinyl Liner Pool Specialists

hero.headline:
Your Pool Deserves a Perfect-Fit
Liner
hero.subheadline: Other companies guess. We custom-measure every pool for a precise vinyl liner fit that lasts for years. Family-owned and owner-operated on the South Shore for over a decade, Crowley Pool Service handles the tough jobs other companies walk away from.

services.label: Our Specialties
services.headline: Vinyl Liner Pools Are<br class="hidden md:block"> All We Think About
services.subtitle: From liner replacements to underground leak repairs, we handle the complex pool work other companies avoid. Every job gets the owner's direct attention.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Custom-measured pool liners with full removal, surface prep, new gaskets, faceplates, and water coordination for a perfect fit every time.

cards.title: Pool Plumbing & Leak Repair
cards.description: Expert leak detection using pressure testing and advanced techniques, plus complete plumbing repairs to stop water loss and protect your investment.

cards.title: Underground Line Replacement
cards.description: Major underground plumbing repairs and full line replacements when leaks occur beneath the pool deck or yard. We do the jobs others refuse.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Complete renovation services for both inground and above-ground vinyl liner pools, transforming aging pools into like-new condition.

cards.title: Spring Openings & Winter Closings
cards.description: Seasonal services to get your pool swim-ready in spring and properly winterized in fall, protecting your equipment from freeze damage.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades
cards.description: Installation of energy-efficient pumps, filters, heaters, and complete system re-plumbing to improve performance and reduce operating costs.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Like-New Pool

steps.title: Tell Us What's Going On
steps.description: Call or message us with your pool issue. We'll ask a few questions, give you an honest assessment, and schedule a visit — usually within days, not weeks.

steps.title: We Custom-Plan Your Fix
steps.description: The owner personally inspects your pool, takes precise measurements, and walks you through the recommended solution with clear pricing. No surprises, no upsells.

steps.title: Dive Back In
steps.description: Our crew handles everything from start to finish — removal, prep, installation, and water coordination. You get a pool that looks and performs like new.

about.label: Why South Shore Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: We Tackle the Pool Problems Others Walk Away From
about.description: Crowley Pool Service started with one truck and a commitment to doing the job right. Ten years later, owner Steve Crowley is still on every job site, personally measuring every pool and overseeing every installation. We built our reputation by solving the complex problems — underground leaks, failing liners, aging plumbing — that other companies say can't be fixed. Your pool is in the hands of people who genuinely care about getting it right.

features.title: Owner On Every Job
features.description: Steve Crowley personally oversees every project. You always know who's working on your pool and who to call.

features.title: Custom-Measured, Every Time
features.description: No guessing, no generic sizing. Every liner is precision-measured for your specific pool to ensure a perfect, lasting fit.

features.title: We Don't Walk Away From Hard Jobs
features.description: Underground leaks, complex plumbing, aging pools — we take on the challenges other companies avoid and deliver results.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Guesswork.
pricing.subtitle: Every quote is custom to your pool. We explain exactly what's needed, what it costs, and why — before any work begins.

guarantee.headline: Our "Get It Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not completely satisfied with our workmanship, we'll come back and make it right at no additional cost. We stand behind every liner, every repair, and every installation because our reputation on the South Shore depends on it. That's the Crowley commitment.

faqs.question: How long does a vinyl liner replacement take?
faqs.answer: Most liner replacements are completed in a single day. We handle everything — draining, removal, surface prep, installation, and water fill coordination. Your pool is typically ready to swim in within 24-48 hours after filling.

faqs.question: How do I know if my liner needs replacing?
faqs.answer: Common signs include fading, wrinkling, pulling away from the track, visible cracks, or persistent leaks. If your liner is 10-15 years old, it's likely time. We'll do an honest inspection and only recommend replacement when it's truly needed.

faqs.question: Do you service above-ground pools too?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We service both inground and above-ground vinyl liner pools across the South Shore. Whether it's a liner swap, equipment upgrade, or leak repair, we've got you covered.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve homeowners throughout Norfolk, Bristol, and Plymouth Counties — including Canton, Stoughton, Sharon, Randolph, Bridgewater, Weymouth, Hanover, Pembroke, and surrounding towns across Southeastern Massachusetts.

faqs.question: Why should I choose Crowley over a bigger pool company?
faqs.answer: Because the owner is on every job. You're not getting a random crew — you're getting Steve and his team, who personally measure, plan, and execute every project. We solve problems bigger companies avoid, and our 4.9-star rating proves it.

testimonials.name: Barbara T.
testimonials.text: This was my first season using Crowley Pool Service. The service was excellent. Each member of the three person crew was professional, patient, and thorough. I ask a lot of questions, which they answered fully and completely.

testimonials.name: Kevin G.
testimonials.text: Had a pool pump issue and the service was amazing. 10 stars. Great technical skills, best prices around and trustworthy company. Will work with them again in a heartbeat and HIGHLY RECOMMEND them for any pool needs.

testimonials.name: Wusung K.
testimonials.text: Steve and his team were great. They were able to come out for a leak check and put a temporary fix so I could continue to use my pool. Very responsive and professional throughout the entire process.
